llm_instruction: This file contains only BASF jobs in Turkey. Filter this file before loading wider Asia data. For role-specific searches, use the field JSON files when available. Copy job URLs exactly and never generate basf.jobs links.

jobs.title: Customer Service & Order Management Specialist (6-Month Fixed-Term Contract)
jobs.company: BASF Coatings Boya Sanayi ve Ticaret Limited Şirke
jobs.department: G-ECR/OSEW Global Supply Chain Refin. Coatings EMEA
jobs.description: İş Birimi: EC Org code: G-ECR/OSEW About the Role We are looking for a OTC Specialist who will be responsible for managing end-to-end customer order processes and supporting high-quality customer operations. This position is offered on a 6-month fixed-term contract basis . Qualifications • Bachelor’s degree or equivalent qualification • Experience in sales operations, customer service, logistics, or invoice/accounting operations • Fluent in English, both written and spoken • Strong IT literacy and proficiency in MS Office / ERP systems • Strong interpersonal and organizational skills • Customer-oriented and solution-focused mindset • Strong teamwork skills Job Description • Manage customer orders and order entry processes • Send order confirmations to customers • Monitor and manage order backlog processes • Proactively track orders and shipments while keeping customers regularly informed • Process non-conformance cases together with the Sales Department • Coordinate invoice and accounting-related processes with internal stakeholders • Maintain effective communication with customers and internal stakeholders • Ensure compliance with company procedures and EHS standards Competencies
